title: Mellow Mexican Prawns Barbacoa
description: A lazy Sunday Mexican dish featuring prawns in a rich and flavorful barbacoa sauce, served with warm tortillas and fresh cilantro.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the chipotle peppers, tomato paste, and chicken broth, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the prawns to the pot and cook until they are pink and fully cooked, about 5-7 minutes.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and lime juice, and season with salt to taste.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the barbacoa by placing the prawns and sauce onto a tortilla and serving immediately.
